reason: Remediating this finding involves deleting local user accounts. Automated removal could unintentionally delete an account that provides SSH, console, or sudo access, leading to lockout. Human verification of each account against the authorized list is needed to avoid breaking authentication or administrative access.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential deletion of required admin or service accounts; Loss of remote SSH or console login capability; Impact on applications that rely on specific local users
